_comment: SINGLE source of truth: every model, its price (USD per 1M tokens), and the roles it serves via 'use_for'. The 4 roles are the backend AI steps: resume_gate (validate resume), analysis (score + report), research (company interview web-search), interview (interview prep). These match the AUDIT log 'timings_ms[...]' labels. To switch which model a step uses, move that role name into a different model's 'use_for'. Each role must appear in exactly one model's 'use_for'. Models without 'use_for' are just priced/available. GPT-5 / o-series are auto-detected as reasoning models. Re-check https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/pricing before trusting prices.
_token_budgets_comment: Base output-token budget per step. Reasoning models get 'reasoning_headroom' added on top automatically.
_reasoning_headroom_comment: Extra output budget for reasoning models ONLY (their thinking counts toward output, so a big JSON answer gets cut off without it). 10000 is validated by a real gpt-5.4-mini analysis. It's a ceiling - unused room is free. Bump it if you ever see truncation.
_reasoning_effort_comment: Reasoning models only. Empty string => 'low' is used. Other values: none (some models), low, medium, high, xhigh.
